items.title: 'If only people knew what a tick could do' - the deadly meat allergies caused by tick bites
items.dek: Mammalian meat allergy is a growing problem along Australia's east coast - and it's caused by tick bites.
items.body: Mammalian meat allergy is a growing problem along Australia's east coast - and it's caused by tick bites.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Yemen's Houthis announce 'maritime embargo' on Saudi Arabia
items.dek: The Houthis say the embargo begins immediately and is a response to a Saudi blockade of ports and airports in Yemen.
items.body: The Houthis say the embargo begins immediately and is a response to a Saudi blockade of ports and airports in Yemen.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Notorious drug cartel leader Ismael Zambada sentenced to life in US prison
items.dek: Known as "El Mayo", the co-founder the Sinaloa Cartel was also ordered to pay $15bn after he admitted to sending vast amounts of drugs to the US.
items.body: Known as "El Mayo", the co-founder the Sinaloa Cartel was also ordered to pay $15bn after he admitted to sending vast amounts of drugs to the US.
items.author: IriLine Desk
